essentia: Descriptor coverage varies by installed Essentia build and model data.
Essentia licensing may require AGPL/commercial compliance review.
musicnn: Tag outputs are model-dependent and should be treated as witness signals.
Embeddings are summarized only; full vectors are intentionally omitted.
beat_tracker: Backend-dependent witness quality; downbeat and meter can remain uncertain.
music21: Symbolic interpretations are weak labels unless human-verified.

recommended_review_items: Beat witness unavailable; review rhythm family confidence manually.
